name: HRT_RATING_LVL_DESCRS_V
query: SELECT RATINGS.RATING_MODEL_ID RATING_MODEL_ID, RATINGS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HRT_RATING_LEVELS_VL WHERE RATING_MODEL_ID = RATINGS.RATING_MODEL_ID AND BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = RATINGS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND STAR_RATING > 0) AS NUM_OF_RATING_LEVELS, DESC1.RATING_DESCRIPTION DESC1, DESC2.RATING_DESCRIPTION DESC2, DESC3.RATING_DESCRIPTION DESC3, DESC4.RATING_DESCRIPTION DESC4, DESC5.RATING_DESCRIPTION DESC5, DESC6.RATING_DESCRIPTION DESC6, DESC7.RATING_DESCRIPTION DESC7, DESC8.RATING_DESCRIPTION DESC8, DESC9.RATING_DESCRIPTION DESC9, DESC10.RATING_DESCRIPTION DESC10 FROM HRT_RATING_MODELS_VL RATINGS, (SELECT RATING_MODEL_ID, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, STAR_RATING, RATING_DESCRIPTION FROM HRT_RATING_LEVELS_VL) DESC1, (SELECT RATING_MODEL_ID, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, STAR_RATING, RATING_DESCRIPTION FROM HRT_RATING_LEVELS_VL) DESC2, (SELECT RATING_MODEL_ID, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, STAR_RATING, RATING_DESCRIPTION FROM HRT_RATING_LEVELS_VL) DESC3, (SELECT RATING_MODEL_ID, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, STAR_RATING, RATING_DESCRIPTION FROM HRT_RATING_LEVELS_VL) DESC4, (SELECT RATING_MODEL_ID, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, STAR_RATING, RATING_DESCRIPTION FROM HRT_RATING_LEVELS_VL) DESC5, (SELECT RATING_MODEL_ID, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, STAR_RATING, RATING_DESCRIPTION FROM HRT_RATING_LEVELS_VL) DESC6, (SELECT RATING_MODEL_ID, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, STAR_RATING, RATING_DESCRIPTION FROM HRT_RATING_LEVELS_VL) DESC7, (SELECT RATING_MODEL_ID, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, STAR_RATING, RATING_DESCRIPTION FROM HRT_RATING_LEVELS_VL) DESC8, (SELECT RATING_MODEL_ID, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, STAR_RATING, RATING_DESCRIPTION FROM HRT_RATING_LEVELS_VL) DESC9, (SELECT RATING_MODEL_ID, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, STAR_RATING, RATING_DESCRIPTION FROM HRT_RATING_LEVELS_VL) DESC10 WHERE RATINGS.RATING_MODEL_ID = DESC1.RATING_MODEL_ID(+) AND RATINGS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = DESC1.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID(+) AND RATINGS.RATING_MODEL_ID = DESC2.RATING_MODEL_ID(+) AND RATINGS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = DESC2.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID(+) AND RATINGS.RATING_MODEL_ID = DESC3.RATING_MODEL_ID(+) AND RATINGS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = DESC3.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID(+) AND RATINGS.RATING_MODEL_ID = DESC4.RATING_MODEL_ID(+) AND RATINGS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = DESC4.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID(+) AND RATINGS.RATING_MODEL_ID = DESC5.RATING_MODEL_ID(+) AND RATINGS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = DESC5.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID(+) AND RATINGS.RATING_MODEL_ID = DESC6.RATING_MODEL_ID(+) AND RATINGS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = DESC6.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID(+) AND RATINGS.RATING_MODEL_ID = DESC7.RATING_MODEL_ID(+) AND RATINGS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = DESC7.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID(+) AND RATINGS.RATING_MODEL_ID = DESC8.RATING_MODEL_ID(+) AND RATINGS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = DESC8.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID(+) AND RATINGS.RATING_MODEL_ID = DESC9.RATING_MODEL_ID(+) AND RATINGS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = DESC9.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID(+) AND RATINGS.RATING_MODEL_ID = DESC10.RATING_MODEL_ID(+) AND RATINGS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = DESC10.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID(+) AND DESC1.STAR_RATING(+) = 1 AND DESC2.STAR_RATING(+) = 2 AND DESC3.STAR_RATING(+) = 3 AND DESC4.STAR_RATING(+) = 4 AND DESC5.STAR_RATING(+) = 5 AND DESC6.STAR_RATING(+) = 6 AND DESC7.STAR_RATING(+) = 7 AND DESC8.STAR_RATING(+) = 8 AND DESC9.STAR_RATING(+) = 9 AND DESC10.STAR_RATING(+) = 10
